name: AssetPropertySummary
description: Contains a summary of a property associated with an asset.

allOf.description: The alias that identifies the property, such as an OPC-UA server data stream path (for example, /company/windfarm/3/turbine/7/temperature). For more information, see Mapping industrial data streams to asset properties in the IoT SiteWise User Guide.
The unit of measure (such as Newtons or RPM) of the asset property.
The MQTT topic to which IoT SiteWise publishes property value update notifications.

notification.description: Contains asset property value notification information. When the notification state is enabled, IoT SiteWise publishes property value updates to a unique MQTT topic. For more information, see Interacting with other services in the IoT SiteWise User Guide.

allOf.description: The ID of the composite model that contains the asset property.
